text.title: QA Risk Matrix Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the product have ≥5 distinct areas AND a release cycle AND test capacity to allocate AND is past MVP?

conclusion.verdict: skip; risk landscape uniform or unknown

branch.question: Is impact distribution non-flat (not all 4s and 5s) AND every score has a customer-effect rationale?
Does every likelihood score have likelihood_data backing it?
Does every quadrant have a non-empty investment_plan entry AND capacity_check passes?

conclusion.verdict: block; fix the investment plan and capacity
publish; schedule next refresh at next release cycle

example.trace: preconditions=true -> impact_flat=false AND rationale_missing=false -> likelihood_data_missing=false -> plan_or_capacity_invalid=false -> r5-per-release-refresh.

text.example: Worked path from root question to the publish conclusion.
